seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter."
new_constraint: The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. Use Markdown format, including one level-1 header titled "Resignation Letter." The response must include at least two level-1 headers.
response:
# Resignation Letter

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day will be [Your Last Day].

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have had during my time here. Working with you and the team has been an invaluable experience, and I have learned a great deal.

# Next Steps

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition over the coming weeks. Please let me know how I can best assist with handing over my responsibilities, training my replacement, or documenting my current projects.

Thank you again for your support and guidance. I wish you and the company all the best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
